commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
it ought to be "nine "ending. (Houbigant, p. 109.) See chap. xiv. 23.
Years. If Jeroboam reigned in the 15th year of Amasias, and his father in the 37th of Joas, and not in the 39th almost complete, this king would have held dominion eighteen years. (Ibid.)

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: Years. Two with his son Joas, (Usher) or three. (Capell) (Du Hamel) See ver. 10.
